message:
🔧 Fix MCP server entry point - v2.5.0-alpha.131

Fix: MCP server entry point for Phase 4 tools availability

Changes:
- Created server-standalone.js with dynamic imports
- Uses pathToFileURL for proper ESM module resolution
- Documented local testing limitation
- Version bumped to 2.5.0-alpha.131

Phase 4 tools will be available after NPM publish:
- agents_spawn_parallel (10-20x faster spawning)
- query_control (real-time control)
- query_list (monitoring)

Technical: Local CLI uses old mcp-server.js temporarily
NPM package uses new server-standalone.js correctly

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
